title: Dutch Prawn Pilaf
description: A simple and flavorful pilaf dish from the Netherlands, loaded with succulent prawns. Perfect as a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Prawns
ingredients.notes: Shell and devein the prawns before using

ingredients.name: Crisp Pilaf Mix
ingredients.notes: Use a store-bought crisp pilaf mix for convenience

ingredients.name: Dutch Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a neutral oil with a high smoke point

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for a brighter flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground for the best flavor

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the prawns and cook until pink and just cooked through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the prawns from the skillet and set aside.
Add the pilaf mix to the skillet and cook according to the package instructions.
Stir in the ginger, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Return the prawns to the skillet and toss to coat with the pilaf mixture.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
